name: ones-skills
description: Agent skills by @gceico for Claude Code.

plugins.name: tool-box
plugins.description: Bundles two agent skills: challenger (adversarial stress-tester for technical decisions, designs, and specs) and skill-forge (turns repeated manual workflows into reusable, validated Agent Skills).

plugins.name: linkedin-ops
plugins.description: White-label LinkedIn creator ops loop: scout (swipe file), ideate (blue-ocean ideas), research (trends), analyze (your own stats). Local .md/.csv files only; depends on the last30days plugin for cross-platform research.
